title: fraxinus oxycarpa var. obliqua
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa var. obliqua, also known as the Manchurian ash or Japanese green ash, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Oleaceae family. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus oxycarpa var. obliqua include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. This plant has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its health benefits of lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Fraxinus oxycarpa var. obliqua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
